raw_consumer_statement:
I received the below alert on XXXX XX/XX/year> from Citi Bank. 
Free Msg Citi Card XXXX. Did you attempt {$320.00} at XXXX XXXX XXXX on XXXX? Yes=1, No=2, or Sign On to Citi Mobile App : Citi.comXXXX. Reply STOP to Opt-Out Free Msg Citi Fraud Dept : To secure acct, please sign on : Citi.comXXXX and open a dispute/replace card or call XXXX. 

Per the suggestion I sign in to my online account and mark the pending transaction as Fraudulent that I didn't do transaction with the merchant and request a replacement card to protect my account. But after couple days I saw the charge posted to my credit card and I dispute the transaction as Fraud. Citi resolve the dispute stating that I provide my account for this transaction. Then I ask them to reopen the dispute since I aware of the charge when I receive the Fraud alert from Citi. I ask based on their investigation to provide me what good or service I transact with the merchant and send me evidence which they ignore my concern. When I ask to reopen and investigate the case again Citi put a remark on my credit card report. I feel I am not fairly treated and Citi not protecting my account from fraudulent activity and I need help on this matter. 

Thanks
